identity.name: Travel Buddy MVP
identity.description: A platform connecting travelers with verified travel companions.

layout_strategies.card_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20 active:scale-95
variants.secondary: bg-white text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm

Card.wrapper: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden

Input.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary/20 focus-visible:border-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200

image_urls.description: Professionals smiling in an airport terminal, used for main hero section to show trust and connection.
Woman looking out airplane window, used for atmospheric/emotional sections.
Close-up of smiling man, used for Buddy Profile example.
Happy couple, used for Testimonial or 'Success Story' section.

accessibility_rules: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Interactive elements must have a min-target size of 44x44px.
Use distinct focus rings (ring-2 ring-offset-2) for keyboard navigation.
All images must have descriptive alt text.
Do not rely on color alone to convey status (use icons + text).
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'DM Sans' for body.
Avoid default shadcn 'zinc' colors. Use the specific 'slate' and 'blue' palette defined above.
Use 'rounded-full' for primary action buttons to make them feel friendly.
Add ample whitespace. Use 'py-24' for section spacing instead of 'py-10'.
Shadows should be colored and diffuse (shadow-blue-500/20), not just black.
Always include a 'Verified' badge (green checkmark) component for Buddy profiles.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Icons should be 20px (w-5 h-5) generally.
Forms should be split into manageable steps if complex (e.g., Buddy Registration).
All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install the fonts first in index.css.
2. Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (primary: blue-600, etc) and fonts.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that wraps pages with the Navbar and Footer.
4. Implement the 'Hero' section using the 'hero_main' image in an asymmetric layout.
5. Build the 'BuddyCard' component with the 'verified' badge and hover effects.
6. Ensure the 'Dashboard' uses a sidebar layout with the specific background colors.
7. Use the defined 'shadows' and 'radius' values for all containers.
